Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*************************************************************************

 The Yoneda lemma for enriched categories

 We prove the Yoneda lemma for enriched categories.

 For enriched categories, there are several options for formulating the
 Yoneda lemma. First of all, one could look at the weak Yoneda lemma. The
 weak Yoneda lemma says something about the *set* of natural transformations,
 namely that this section is isomorphic to the collection of global
 elements. This statement is proven in Section 1.9 of [1].

 Alternatively, one could truly use the enrichments. Instead of talking
 about the set of natural transformations, one talks about the object in
 the category `V` over which we enrich. The existence of this object
 relies on `V` being a symmetric closed monoidal category with enough
 limits. This statement is called the strong Yoneda Lemma, and it is
 proven in Section 2.4 of [1].

 In this file, we prove the strong Yoneda lemma. The precise formulation
 that we use, is that the Yoneda embedding is a fully faithful enriched
 functor.

 The main challenge in the proof is applying the naturality. In the strong
 Yoneda lemma, we are working with an object in `V` that represents the
 enriched natural transformations. This object is defined when constructing
 the enriched functor category (see Examples.FunctorCategory.v). Concretely,
 we take an equalizer (represents the naturality condition) of a product
 (the morphisms of the natural transformation). To use the naturality, we
 need to use the fact that the equalizer gives rise to an equalizer diagram.
 This comes up in the statement [yoneda_inv_left].

 References
 [1]: Basic Concepts of Enriched Category Theory, Max Kelly
      (http://www.tac.mta.ca/tac/reprints/articles/10/tr10.pdf)

 Contents
 1. The inverse of the Yoneda embedding
 2. The strong Yoneda lemma

 *************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.OppositeEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.SelfEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.Yoneda.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Section YonedaLemma.
  Context {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
          {C : category}
          (E : enrichment C V)
          (EqV : Equalizers V)
          (PV : Products C V)
          (PV' : Products (C × C) V).

  (** * 1. The inverse of the Yoneda embedding *)
  Section Inverse.
    Context (x y : C).

    Definition yoneda_inv
      : enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV'
          ⦃ enriched_yoneda_functor E x , enriched_yoneda_functor E y ⦄
        -->
        E ⦃ x, y ⦄
      := EqualizerArrow _
         · ProductPr _ _ _ x
         · mon_rinvunitor _
         · (identity _ #⊗ enriched_id E x)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ x , x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄).

    Arguments yoneda_inv /.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y
· yoneda_inv = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y
· yoneda_inv = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
  (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq E PV PV' x y)
· (EqualizerArrow
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       x
   · mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
   · identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
     #⊗ enriched_id E x
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
  (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq E PV PV' x y)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
· mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
· mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
· mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
?b = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
· mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x =
?y'

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
internal_lam (enriched_comp E x x y)
· mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E x x y)
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E x x y)
   #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ enriched_id E x
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

   #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ enriched_id E x
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))) = 
?b

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E x x y)
   #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ enriched_id E x
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
internal_lam (enriched_comp E x x y)
#⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
   #⊗ enriched_id E x
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) = ?t2

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
internal_lam (enriched_comp E x x y)
#⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
internal_lam (enriched_comp E x x y)
#⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E x x y)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E x x y)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) · mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      apply mon_rinvunitor_runitor.
    Qed.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
yoneda_inv
· enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y =
identity
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV'
   ⦃ enriched_yoneda_functor E x,
   enriched_yoneda_functor E y ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
yoneda_inv
· enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y =
identity
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV'
   ⦃ enriched_yoneda_functor E x,
   enriched_yoneda_functor E y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
· mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EqualizerIn
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
    (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (ProductArrow C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ x0 : C,
        internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
    (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq E PV PV' x y) =
identity
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
· mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_id E x
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EqualizerIn
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
    (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (ProductArrow C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ x0 : C,
        internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
    (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq E PV PV' x y)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) =
identity
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
         #⊗ enriched_id E x
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            · (EqualizerIn
                 (enriched_functor_hom
                    (op_enrichment V E)
                    (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
                    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment
                       E x)
                    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment
                       E y)) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
                 (ProductArrow C V
                    (PV
                       (λ x0 : C,
                        (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
                    (λ x0 : C,
                     internal_lam
                       (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
                 (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq E
                    PV PV' x y)
               · EqualizerArrow
                   (enriched_functor_hom
                      (op_enrichment V E)
                      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
                      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment
                         E x)
                      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment
                         E y))))))) =
identity
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
         #⊗ enriched_id E x
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            · ProductArrow C V
                (PV
                   (λ x0 : C,
                    (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
                (λ x0 : C,
                 internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))))) =
identity
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))

   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))

                (λ x0 : C,
                 internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)

     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))

     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))

   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))

     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))

     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
         #⊗ enriched_id E x
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            · (ProductArrow C V
                 (PV
                    (λ x0 : C,
                     (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
                 (λ x0 : C,
                  internal_lam
                    (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
               · ProductPr C V
                   (PV
                      (λ x0 : C,
                       (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
                   z))))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
?b =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
         #⊗ enriched_id E x
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            · (ProductArrow C V
                 (PV
                    (λ x0 : C,
                     (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
                 (λ x0 : C,
                  internal_lam
                    (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
               · ProductPr C V
                   (PV
                      (λ x0 : C,
                       (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
                   z))))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z =
?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
         #⊗ enriched_id E x
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            · internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y))))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧),
(EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
    · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
       · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x
          · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             · internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y))))))
#⊗ h · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) =
(EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z)
#⊗ h · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
(EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
    · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
       · (identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x
          · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             · internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y))))))
#⊗ h · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) =
(EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z)
#⊗ h · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y)
              #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)))))
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · (internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y)
               #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
               · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E z x y)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))

      (* we want to use naturality *)
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· enriched_functor_left_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· enriched_functor_right_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E z x y)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· enriched_functor_left_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· enriched_functor_right_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E z x y)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · enriched_functor_left_map_ob
         (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V)
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)
         (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · enriched_functor_right_map_ob
         (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V)
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
         (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E z x y)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E z x y)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))

      (* we apply naturality on a morphism going from `x` to `y` *)
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
p₂:= maponpaths
  (λ f : V
         ⟦ enriched_functor_hom
             (op_enrichment V E)
             (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
             (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                x)
             (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                y),
         PV'
           (λ xy : C × C,
            (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
            ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
              ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)) ⟧,
   f
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
       (x,, z)) p₁
:
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0 ⦄))
       (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                    y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
    (x,, z) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0 ⦄))
       (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x
               (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
    (x,, z): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
    (x,, z) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
    (x,, z)
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E z x y)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
p₂: EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr1 xy) ⦄)
             (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy
              ⦄)
           · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               y (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
             #⊗ identity
                  (self_enrichment V
                   ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                       E x (pr1 xy),
                   enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                     E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr2 xy) ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z))
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E z x y)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
p₂: EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr1 xy) ⦄)
             (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy
              ⦄)
           · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               y (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
             #⊗ identity
                  (self_enrichment V
                   ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                       E x (pr1 xy),
                   enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                     E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr2 xy) ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z))
p₃:= ! maponpaths
    (λ z0 : V
            ⟦ PV
                (λ x0 : C,
                 (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
            (λ xy : C × C,
             (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
               ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)) (x,, z) ⟧,
     EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
     · z0)
    (ProductPrCommutes (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        ProductPr (C ^opp) V
          (PV
             (λ x0 : C ^opp,
              self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                  x0,
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                x0 ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V
               (self_enrichment V
                ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                    x (pr1 xy),
                enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                  (pr1 xy) ⦄)
               (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy
                ⦄)
             · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                 y (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
               #⊗ identity
                    (self_enrichment V
                     ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                         E x (pr1 xy),
                     enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                       E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
             · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
                 (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                    x (pr1 xy))
                 (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                    y (pr1 xy))
                 (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                    y (pr2 xy)))) (x,, z)) @
p₂ @
maponpaths
  (λ z0 : V
          ⟦ PV
              (λ x0 : C,
               (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
            (x,, z) ⟧,
   EqualizerArrow
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
   · z0)
  (ProductPrCommutes (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (λ xy : C × C,
      (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
      ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C × C,
         (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                  (pr2 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr2 xy) ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                  (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                  (pr2 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                  (pr2 xy)))) (x,, z)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
   ProductPr (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0 ⦄))
     (pr1 xy)
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
            (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          #⊗ identity
               (self_enrichment V
                ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E x (pr1 xy),
                enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
        · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
            (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy))
            (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy))
            (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy)))) (x,, z) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
   ProductPr (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0 ⦄))
     (pr2 xy)
   · internal_lam
       (identity
          (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr2 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x
             (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
        · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
            (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy))
            (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr2 xy))
            (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy)))) (x,, z)
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) x
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · ((identity ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          #⊗ enriched_id E x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · (internal_eval (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E z x y)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)) #⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
p₂: EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr1 xy) ⦄)
             (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy
              ⦄)
           · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               y (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
             #⊗ identity
                  (self_enrichment V
                   ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                       E x (pr1 xy),
                   enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                     E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr2 xy) ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z))
p₃:= ! maponpaths
    (λ z0 : V
            ⟦ PV
                (λ x0 : C,
                 (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
            (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
     EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
     · z0)
    (ProductPrCommutes (C × C) V
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ xy : C × C,
        ProductPr C V
          (PV
             (λ x0 : C,
              (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
          (pr1 xy)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V
               ((E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄))
               (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
             · internal_lam
                 (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
