      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV
         (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      z
    · internal_lam
        (identity ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_lam
              (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E z x x)
         · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
             (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
mon_rinvunitor
  (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
     (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) I_{ V}
   · (mon_rassociator ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
        (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) I_{ V}
      · mon_runitor
          (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
           ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)))) =
identity
  (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
p₂: EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr1 xy) ⦄)
             (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy
              ⦄)
           · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               y (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
             #⊗ identity
                  (self_enrichment V
                   ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                       E x (pr1 xy),
                   enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                     E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr2 xy) ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z))
p₃:= ! maponpaths
    (λ z0 : V
            ⟦ PV
                (λ x0 : C,
                 (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
            (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
     EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
     · z0)
    (ProductPrCommutes (C × C) V
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ xy : C × C,
        ProductPr C V
          (PV
             (λ x0 : C,
              (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
          (pr1 xy)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V
               ((E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄))
               (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
             · internal_lam
                 (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
                    (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄)
                  · enriched_comp E (pr2 xy)
                      (pr1 xy) y)
               #⊗ identity
                    ((E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                     ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄))
             · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) @
p₂ @
maponpaths
  (λ z0 : V
          ⟦ PV
              (λ x0 : C,
               (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
          ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
   EqualizerArrow
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
   · z0)
  (ProductPrCommutes (C × C) V
     (λ xy : C × C,
      (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
      ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C × C,
         (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C × C,
      ProductPr C V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C,
            (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             ((E ⦃ pr2 xy, x ⦄)
              ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
           #⊗ internal_lam
                (sym_mon_braiding V
                   (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                 · enriched_comp E (pr2 xy)
                     (pr1 xy) x)
           · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
               (E ⦃ pr2 xy, x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
     (x,, z)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     x
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
               (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             · enriched_comp E z x y)
          #⊗ identity
               ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
        · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     z
   · internal_lam
       (identity ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
        #⊗ internal_lam
             (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
              · enriched_comp E z x x)
        · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z0 : V
          ⟦ enriched_functor_hom
              (op_enrichment V E)
              (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                 x)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                 y),
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
          ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
   z0 #⊗ h
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
       ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))) p₃: (EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV
         (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      x
    · internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
           (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · internal_lam
             (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
              · enriched_comp E z x y)
           #⊗ identity
                ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
         · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) =
(EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV
         (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      z
    · internal_lam
        (identity ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_lam
              (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E z x x)
         · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
             (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
mon_rinvunitor
  (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
     (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) I_{ V}
   · (mon_rassociator ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
        (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) I_{ V}
      · mon_runitor
          (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
           ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)))) =
mon_rinvunitor
  (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))
· mon_runitor
    (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
p₂: EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr1 xy) ⦄)
             (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy
              ⦄)
           · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               y (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
             #⊗ identity
                  (self_enrichment V
                   ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                       E x (pr1 xy),
                   enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                     E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr2 xy) ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z))
p₃:= ! maponpaths
    (λ z0 : V
            ⟦ PV
                (λ x0 : C,
                 (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
            (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
     EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
     · z0)
    (ProductPrCommutes (C × C) V
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ xy : C × C,
        ProductPr C V
          (PV
             (λ x0 : C,
              (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
          (pr1 xy)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V
               ((E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄))
               (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
             · internal_lam
                 (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
                    (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄)
                  · enriched_comp E (pr2 xy)
                      (pr1 xy) y)
               #⊗ identity
                    ((E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                     ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄))
             · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) @
p₂ @
maponpaths
  (λ z0 : V
          ⟦ PV
              (λ x0 : C,
               (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
          ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
   EqualizerArrow
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
   · z0)
  (ProductPrCommutes (C × C) V
     (λ xy : C × C,
      (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
      ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C × C,
         (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C × C,
      ProductPr C V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C,
            (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             ((E ⦃ pr2 xy, x ⦄)
              ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
           #⊗ internal_lam
                (sym_mon_braiding V
                   (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                 · enriched_comp E (pr2 xy)
                     (pr1 xy) x)
           · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
               (E ⦃ pr2 xy, x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
     (x,, z)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     x
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
               (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             · enriched_comp E z x y)
          #⊗ identity
               ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
        · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     z
   · internal_lam
       (identity ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
        #⊗ internal_lam
             (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
              · enriched_comp E z x x)
        · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z0 : V
          ⟦ enriched_functor_hom
              (op_enrichment V E)
              (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                 x)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                 y),
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
          ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
   z0 #⊗ h
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
       ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))) p₃: (EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV
         (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      x
    · internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
           (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · internal_lam
             (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
              · enriched_comp E z x y)
           #⊗ identity
                ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
         · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) =
(EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV
         (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      z
    · internal_lam
        (identity ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_lam
              (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E z x x)
         · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
             (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
  (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) I_{ V}
· (mon_rassociator ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
     (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) I_{ V}
   · mon_runitor
       (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))) =
mon_runitor
  (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
p₂: EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr1 xy) ⦄)
             (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy
              ⦄)
           · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               y (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
             #⊗ identity
                  (self_enrichment V
                   ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                       E x (pr1 xy),
                   enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                     E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr2 xy) ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z))
p₃:= ! maponpaths
    (λ z0 : V
            ⟦ PV
                (λ x0 : C,
                 (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
            (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
     EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
     · z0)
    (ProductPrCommutes (C × C) V
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ xy : C × C,
        ProductPr C V
          (PV
             (λ x0 : C,
              (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
          (pr1 xy)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V
               ((E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄))
               (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
             · internal_lam
                 (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
                    (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄)
                  · enriched_comp E (pr2 xy)
                      (pr1 xy) y)
               #⊗ identity
                    ((E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                     ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄))
             · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) @
p₂ @
maponpaths
  (λ z0 : V
          ⟦ PV
              (λ x0 : C,
               (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
          ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
   EqualizerArrow
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
   · z0)
  (ProductPrCommutes (C × C) V
     (λ xy : C × C,
      (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
      ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C × C,
         (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C × C,
      ProductPr C V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C,
            (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             ((E ⦃ pr2 xy, x ⦄)
              ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
           #⊗ internal_lam
                (sym_mon_braiding V
                   (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                 · enriched_comp E (pr2 xy)
                     (pr1 xy) x)
           · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
               (E ⦃ pr2 xy, x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
     (x,, z)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     x
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
               (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             · enriched_comp E z x y)
          #⊗ identity
               ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
        · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     z
   · internal_lam
       (identity ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
        #⊗ internal_lam
             (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
              · enriched_comp E z x x)
        · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z0 : V
          ⟦ enriched_functor_hom
              (op_enrichment V E)
              (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                 x)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                 y),
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
          ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
   z0 #⊗ h
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
       ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))) p₃: (EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV
         (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      x
    · internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
           (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · internal_lam
             (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
              · enriched_comp E z x y)
           #⊗ identity
                ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
         · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) =
(EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV
         (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      z
    · internal_lam
        (identity ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_lam
              (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E z x x)
         · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
             (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
  (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) I_{ V}
· mon_rassociator ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
    (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) I_{ V}
· mon_runitor
    (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)) =
mon_runitor
  (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
p₁:= EqualizerEqAr
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr1 xy) ⦄)
            (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
          · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y
              (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
            #⊗ identity
                 (self_enrichment V
                  ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                      E x (pr1 xy),
                  enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                    E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy)))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
             (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
               x0,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
           ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
     · internal_lam
         (identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
               (pr2 xy) ⦄)
          #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
          · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr1 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                 (pr2 xy))
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                 (pr2 xy))))
p₂: EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr1 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr1 xy) ⦄)
             (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy
              ⦄)
           · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
               y (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
             #⊗ identity
                  (self_enrichment V
                   ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                       E x (pr1 xy),
                   enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
                     E y (pr1 xy) ⦄)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
              (pr2 xy) ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E x
                x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y x0
            ⦄)) (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E y
                (pr2 xy) ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                x (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)
           · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr1 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  x (pr2 xy))
               (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor E
                  y (pr2 xy))))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
             ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z))
p₃:= ! maponpaths
    (λ z0 : V
            ⟦ PV
                (λ x0 : C,
                 (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
            (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
     EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
     · z0)
    (ProductPrCommutes (C × C) V
       (λ xy : C × C,
        (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C × C,
           (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
       (PV
          (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ xy : C × C,
        ProductPr C V
          (PV
             (λ x0 : C,
              (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
          (pr1 xy)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V
               ((E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄))
               (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
             · internal_lam
                 (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
                    (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄)
                  · enriched_comp E (pr2 xy)
                      (pr1 xy) y)
               #⊗ identity
                    ((E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                     ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄))
             · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr1 xy, y ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))) (x,, z)) @
p₂ @
maponpaths
  (λ z0 : V
          ⟦ PV
              (λ x0 : C,
               (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)),
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
          ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
   EqualizerArrow
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
   · z0)
  (ProductPrCommutes (C × C) V
     (λ xy : C × C,
      (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
      ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C × C,
         (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C × C,
      ProductPr C V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C,
            (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (pr2 xy)
      · internal_lam
          (identity
             ((E ⦃ pr2 xy, x ⦄)
              ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄))
           #⊗ internal_lam
                (sym_mon_braiding V
                   (E ⦃ pr2 xy, pr1 xy ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
                 · enriched_comp E (pr2 xy)
                     (pr1 xy) x)
           · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 xy, x ⦄)
               (E ⦃ pr2 xy, x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 xy, y ⦄)))
     (x,, z)): EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     x
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
        · internal_lam
            (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
               (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             · enriched_comp E z x y)
          #⊗ identity
               ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
        · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
            (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
· (ProductPr C V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     z
   · internal_lam
       (identity ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
        #⊗ internal_lam
             (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
              · enriched_comp E z x x)
        · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z0 : V
          ⟦ enriched_functor_hom
              (op_enrichment V E)
              (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                 x)
              (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E
                 y),
          (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
          ⊸ (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) ⟧,
   z0 #⊗ h
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
       ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))) p₃: (EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV
         (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      x
    · internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
           (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
         · internal_lam
             (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
              · enriched_comp E z x y)
           #⊗ identity
                ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
         · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
             (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) =
(EqualizerArrow
   (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
      (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E x)
      (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment E y))
 · (ProductPr C V
      (PV
         (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      z
    · internal_lam
        (identity ((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_lam
              (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E z x x)
         · internal_comp (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
             (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄))
identity
  (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   ⊗ I_{ V})
· mon_runitor
    (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)) =
mon_runitor
  (((E ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))

        apply id_left.
    Qed.
  End Inverse.

  (** * 2. The strong Yoneda lemma *)
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
fully_faithful_enriched_functor
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV')

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
fully_faithful_enriched_functor
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV')

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
V
⟦ enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV'
  ⦃ enriched_yoneda_functor E x,
  enriched_yoneda_functor E y ⦄, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y) ?g

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
V
⟦ enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV'
  ⦃ enriched_yoneda_functor E x,
  enriched_yoneda_functor E y ⦄, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
 exact (yoneda_inv x y).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y)
  (yoneda_inv x y)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y
· yoneda_inv x y = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
yoneda_inv x y
· enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y =
identity
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV'
   ⦃ enriched_yoneda_functor E x,
   enriched_yoneda_functor E y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y
· yoneda_inv x y = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 exact (yoneda_inv_right x y).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
yoneda_inv x y
· enriched_yoneda_enrichment E EqV PV PV' x y =
identity
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV'
   ⦃ enriched_yoneda_functor E x,
   enriched_yoneda_functor E y ⦄)
 exact (yoneda_inv_left x y).
  Defined.
End YonedaLemma.
